description: Monthly and annual gold prices in USD per troy ounce from 1833 to present. Historical data (1833–1959) is sourced from records compiled by Timothy Green; data from 1960 onward is sourced from the World Bank Commodity Markets portal.

licenses.name: ODC-PDDL-1.0
licenses.title: Open Data Commons Public Domain Dedication and License

name: gold-prices

resources.name: monthly-processed
resources.description: Monthly gold prices in USD per troy ounce from 1833 to present, with dates formatted as ISO 8601 full dates (YYYY-MM-DD). Rows from 1833 to 1959 carry the annual average price repeated for every month of the year, as no true monthly readings exist for that period.

fields.name: Date
fields.description: First day of the month in YYYY-MM-DD format (ISO 8601).

fields.name: Price
fields.description: Gold price in USD per troy ounce.

resources.description: Annual average gold prices in USD per troy ounce from 1833 to present.

fields.description: Annual average gold price in USD per troy ounce.

resources.name: monthly
resources.description: Monthly gold prices in USD per troy ounce from 1833 to present, with dates in YYYY-MM format. Rows from 1833 to 1959 carry the annual average price repeated for every month of the year, as no true monthly readings exist for that period.

fields.name: Date
fields.description: Year and month of the observation in YYYY-MM format.

title: Gold Prices

views.name: gold-price-history
views.title: Gold Price History Since 1833
views.description: Monthly gold price in USD per troy ounce from 1833 to present. For over 130 years prices held near $20 under the gold standard. Nixon's 1971 decision to end dollar-gold convertibility broke the peg — prices have risen roughly 280× since, recently surpassing $5,000.

y.label: Price (USD per troy oz, log scale)
